name: Spicy Cajun Style Buffalo Wings
recipeInstructions:
Chicken wings or small chicken legs; more wings or legs can be added if needed.
Kraft BBQ Sauce or K.C. Style sauce.
Cajun Spice or Captain's Link's Cajun seasoning.
1. In a Crockpot, add the chicken wings and Kraft Spicy BBQ sauce.
2. Add all spices (Red Cayenne Pepper, Salt, Black Pepper, Garlic flakes, Onion flakes, Worcestershire Sauce, Tabasco Sauce, and Cajun Spice).
3. Stir to combine.
4. Cook on low for 4 hours.
5. Serve.
